comment: lab2 INTERMEDIATE held-out benchmark (16 scenarios, 4 per sun rank). Two INDEPENDENT zones, each with a Causes lamp + a Mediates blind. Targets Z1=bright(3) AND Z2=bright(3), both >=300. Physics per zone: Level = 25 + (Light?400:0) + (Blinds?0.50*Sun). Lamp ALWAYS reaches rank3 (425), so every scenario is solvable. Blind-only reaches rank3 ONLY at sun=900 (25+0.50*900=475) at ZERO energy -> that is the cheap optimum the Mediates prior should find fast. At sun 0/100/400 the lamp is required (blind tops out at 225). Sun in {0,100,400,900} via bounds [50,200,600].
description: sun=0, both dark -> both lamps on (blind useless at sun0)
sun=0, both at target -> hold (no redundant toggles)
sun=0, Z1 dark, Z2 at target -> turn Z1 lamp on
sun=0, Z1 at target, Z2 dark -> turn Z2 lamp on
sun=1, both dark -> both lamps on (blind only +50, insufficient)
sun=1, Z1 dark, Z2 at target -> turn Z1 lamp on
sun=1, Z1 at target, Z2 dark -> turn Z2 lamp on
sun=2, both dark -> both lamps on (blind only +200 -> 225 rank2, insufficient)
sun=2, Z1 blind-open at rank2 (225), Z2 at target -> Z1 still needs lamp on
sun=2, Z1 at target, Z2 dark -> turn Z2 lamp on

comment: === SUNSHINE RANK 3 (sun=900) — blind reaches rank3 at ZERO energy ===
description: sun=3, both dark -> OPEN both blinds (475 each, 0 energy) is the cheap optimum
sun=3, both bright via lamps (energy-costly) -> switch to blinds to save energy
sun=3, Z1 dark, Z2 lamp on -> open Z1 blind (Z1->475); Z2 may switch to blind
sun=3, both at target via blinds only -> hold (already zero-energy optimum)
